title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBI Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBI Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
RBI Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About RBI Advisory Limited:
RBI Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI Advisory Limited!
